I'm Dev Chopra

A Product Manager

A generalist who adapts to what your organization needs. From strategy to execution, from design to deployment — I deliver.

View My WorkLet's Talk

AI & Automation
VibeCoding

The Startup
Generalist.

I operate at the intersection of product, marketing, and engineering. Currently driving strategy in the Founder's Office at Veena Studio and specializing in Gen AI at BITSoM.

With experience spanning 50+ global clients, I focus on building systems that scale. From designing high-fidelity behavioral UIs to engineering NFC infrastructure, I deliver high-agency execution.

I don't just build features; I build products that solve problems. Execution is the only truth I recognize.

Featured Work

Built, Shipped & Scaled.

I don't just build features; I build products that solve real problems. Execution is everything.

TapQR

Hybrid NFC + QR intelligent payment infrastructure for small merchants in India. Stealth — protecting early IP.

View Project

Altme

AI-native social platform for Gen Z — connect with your AI twin, remove introvert barriers, build grounded decisions.

View Project

Nivaari Health

Complete health ally & period tracker designed specifically for Indian women, with cultural and Ayurvedic context.

View Project

Veena Studio DAW

Web & desktop Digital Audio Workstation rethinking creative tooling in native and browser environments.

View Project

AuraScore

Behavioral UI experiment — quiz that calculates your Aura Points. Simple, weird, fun.

View Project

Design Portfolio

Visual design, brand identities, and UI/UX work for various startups.

View Project
